itinerary.title: Chilika Romance Whispering Waves Sacred Sands
itinerary.overview:
CHILIKA ROMANCE • WHISPERING WAVES & SACRED SANDS Welcome to an ethereal coastal romance curated exclusively by TRAGUIN. Embark on the definitive Odisha Honeymoon Package, meticulously crafted to immerse you in the breathtaking landscapes, ancient architecture, and tranquil blue waters of Chilika Lake and Puri. As your dedicated premium travel TRAGUIN Premium Luxury Itinerary — OD-005 1 consultants, TRAGUIN transforms your romantic getaway into a seamless luxury holiday filled with premium stays, curated candle-lit milestones, and intimate coastal journeys. Let the scenic beauty of Asia's largest brackish water lagoon and the timeless heritage of Odisha craft unforgettable memories for you and your significant other.

TOUR OVERVIEW
This custom-tailored luxury holiday package offers the perfect harmonious blend of pristine beach retreats, tranquil natural sanctuaries, and legendary artistic marvels. Traveling in a fully private, chauffeured premium vehicle with dedicated local assistance, your romantic journey ensures absolute comfort, exclusivity, and safety. Featuring a carefully curated meal plan with expansive breakfasts and intimate gourmet dining, this itinerary covers the absolute finest points of a premium Odisha experience. Every single day of your journey incorporates specialized TRAGUIN curated experiences—including private boat safaris to catch Irrawaddy dolphins and reserved sunset viewings over the Bay of Bengal.

WHY VISIT
When considering a Luxury Odisha Holiday, discerning couples search for an escape that offers untouched beaches, high-end comfort, and deep cultural roots. Odisha presents some of the most iconic attractions in India. From the world-famous Jagannath Temple in Puri and the grand UNESCO World Heritage Sun Temple at Konark, to the pristine ecotourism zones of Chilika Lake—a top tourist place in Odisha for dolphin watching and bird photography—this region provides magical depth. For couples celebrating love with a bespoke Odisha Honeymoon Package or families looking for a comprehensive Odisha Family Tour, the Golden Triangle of Odisha unveils highly popular Instagram locations like the Marine Drive eco-retreats, the majestic Mukteshwar Temple carvings, and the serene crimson sunsets of Chandrabhaga Beach. Whether you wish to explore authentic Raghurajpur artisan heritage shopping, indulge in rich local seafood delicacies, or walk hand-in-hand along secluded golden beaches, our personalized TRAGUIN Odisha Packages guarantee premium handpicked hotels and exclusive experiences during the best time to visit Odisha.
itinerary.seo_title: OD-005 | Chilika Romance Whispering Waves Sacred Sands | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Odisha package (OD-005 / TRG-ODI-005): Bhubaneswar • Puri • Chilika Lake (Satapada) • Konark with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

Day 03: EXCURSION TO CHILIKA LAKE (SATAPADA) — CRUISING THE LAGOON – IRRAWADDY DOLPHINS & WHISPERING WAVES
Day 04: PURI TO KONARK TO BHUBANESWAR — THE STONE CHARIOT OF THE SUN & THE MARINE DRIVE ECO-RETREAT
Day 05: BHUBANESWAR SIGHTSEEING TO DEPARTURE — ANCIENT CAVES & CHERISHING UNFORGETTABLE MEMORIES
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: A completely private sunset beach photoshoot session for newlyweds with a professional photographer.
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Expertly timed historical explorations to avoid crowded hours and capture perfect sunlight.
Premium Handpicked Hotels: Only highly rated seaside resorts with private beach access points are chosen.
Luxury Transportation: Courteous, background-verified chauffeurs acting as localized destination guides.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN BHUBANESWAR TO PURI — WELCOME TO THE TEMPLE CITY & THE SACRED SEA BRIDGE
days.description: Your premium Odisha experience begins as you touch down at Biju Patnaik International Airport or arrive at Bhubaneswar Railway Station. A dedicated private luxury transport vehicle will greet you warmly and 2 smoothly escort you on a scenic route toward the holy coastal capital, Puri. En route, make an emotional stop at Dhauli Peace Pagoda, the historic site of Emperor Ashoka's transformation. Upon arrival in Puri, check into your handpicked premium luxury resort facing the sea. Relax as a customized welcome amenity kit and room decoration await you.
activities: Sightseeing Included:  Dhauli Peace Pagoda, Pipli Applique Heritage Village village walk, Puri Beach.
Evening Experience:  Honeymoon Special: Complimentary welcome cake and beachside sunset walk with a
Overnight Stay:  Puri (Premium Sea-Facing Luxury Resort)
Meals Included:  Welcome Refreshment & Luxury Dinner

days.title: PURI SIGHTSEEING & RAGHURAJPUR ART VILLAGE — SACRED BLESSINGS & TIMELESS HERITAGE COUTURE
days.description: Awake early for a deeply moving morning experience with a private VIP darshan at the legendary Jagannath Temple, a highly searched cultural attraction in Odisha. Absorb the profound spiritual aura before returning to your resort for a lavish breakfast. In the afternoon, embark on an immersive experience to Raghurajpur Heritage Craft Village. Walk hand-in-hand through this living museum, interacting with master artists specializing in historic Pattachitra paintings.
activities: Sightseeing Included:  Jagannath Temple (VIP Assistance), Raghurajpur Heritage Craft Village, Gundicha
Optional Activities:  Private pottery making session and personalized souvenir collection.
Evening Experience:  Intimate beachside dining under a beautifully illuminated canopy with sea views.
Overnight Stay:  Puri (Premium Sea-Facing Luxury Resort)
Meals Included:  Premium Breakfast & Romantic Canopy Dinner

days.title: EXCURSION TO CHILIKA LAKE (SATAPADA) — CRUISING THE LAGOON – IRRAWADDY DOLPHINS & WHISPERING WAVES
days.description: After a refreshing coastal breakfast, drive to Satapada on Chilika Lake, an incredible natural paradise and a premier focal point of your luxury Odisha holiday. Board an exclusive, private luxury motorized boat chartered solely for you by TRAGUIN experts. Cruise into the vast lagoon to catch glimpses of rare, playful Irrawaddy Dolphins dancing in the water. Visit the breathtaking Sea Mouth where Chilika Lake meets the roaring Bay of Bengal—a magnificent photography point perfect for capturing unforgettable memories. 3
activities: Sightseeing Included:  Chilika Lake Lagoon Cruise, Irrawaddy Dolphin Sanctuary, Sea Mouth Island Beach.
Optional Activities:  Fresh lagoon-side premium seafood lunch prepared on a private island.
Overnight Stay:  Puri (Premium Sea-Facing Luxury Resort)
Meals Included:  Premium Breakfast & Gourmet Seafood / Multi-cuisine Dinner

days.title: PURI TO KONARK TO BHUBANESWAR — THE STONE CHARIOT OF THE SUN & THE MARINE DRIVE ECO-RETREAT
days.description: Check out after breakfast and traverse the breathtakingly scenic Konark Marine Drive, flanked by beautiful woods and surging blue sea waves. Arrive at the iconic Konark Sun Temple, a mesmerizing 13th-century architectural marvel shaped like a colossal stone chariot. Walk along Chandrabhaga Beach, a popular Instagram location for capturing dramatic panoramic wave photography. In the afternoon, drive back to Bhubaneswar, checking into your ultra-luxury metropolitan hotel.
activities: Sightseeing Included:  Konark Sun Temple (with expert historian guide), Chandrabhaga Beach, Mukteshwar
Evening Experience:  Farewell premium dining experience featuring local signature dessert sampling.
Meals Included:  Premium Breakfast & Farewell Elite Dinner

days.title: BHUBANESWAR SIGHTSEEING TO DEPARTURE — ANCIENT CAVES & CHERISHING UNFORGETTABLE MEMORIES
days.description: Conclude your premium Odisha experience after a lavish breakfast buffet. Discover the historic twin hills of Udayagiri and Khandagiri, featuring ancient rock-cut caves that date back to the 2nd century BC. Following an afternoon of souvenir shopping for genuine hand-woven Ikkat silk textiles, your private luxury transport vehicle will drop you safely at Bhubaneswar Airport or Railway Station. Return home carrying a heart filled with romance and unforgettable memories curated seamlessly by TRAGUIN.
activities: Transfers Included:  Private door-to-door luxury airport/station drop-off.
